what_it_does: Records metadata for a single image attachment in a channel-memory ledger, linking an attachment id to a design-assets channel image target and an added timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
standouts: target string includes a parenthetical numeric qualifier (55)
minimal record with only attachment metadata
concerns: target string contains spaces and parentheses, which may be auto-generated or fragile
no title, alt text, or descriptive label for the image
no explicit consumer or usage context
notes: A minimal ledger attachment record for an image asset in the design-assets channel.
questions: What does the (55) suffix in the target signify?
Is the target URI stable and resolvable?
What system or query consumes this attachment record?
intention_signals: Catalog a specific image attachment so it can be referenced and retrieved within the design-assets channel.
novelty: The target string uses a parenthetical numeric qualifier, suggesting indexed or duplicate-named assets.
contribution: Provides a concrete attachment identity, channel context, media type, target URI, and creation timestamp for an image asset, supporting retrieval and audit.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment record att-89ad7dd7 registers an image asset in the design-assets channel pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (55) with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Track and reference a specific image attachment within the design-assets channel.
